data.name: Heaven's Door
data.detailed_description:
On a lonely stretch of road outside of Houma, Louisiana, is a gentlemen's club: Heaven's Door.

One late Thursday night you are driving by, as you have a dozen times over a dozen recent Thursdays. This time, however, something tells you to park and head inside...

And the course of your life changes in ways you could not have imagined.

From the creators of Bare Witness, join us as we tell the story of a man with little left to lose, and nothing left to live for, who finds a bit of each in the most unlikely place.

With 10 main love interests, a slew of side romances, branching storylines, and plenty of sexiness, we hope you'll find many reasons to return again and again to Heaven's Door. So find a seat, get your singles ready, and prepare for the ride of a lifetime.
data.about_the_game:
On a lonely stretch of road outside of Houma, Louisiana, is a gentlemen's club: Heaven's Door.

One late Thursday night you are driving by, as you have a dozen times over a dozen recent Thursdays. This time, however, something tells you to park and head inside...

And the course of your life changes in ways you could not have imagined.

From the creators of Bare Witness, join us as we tell the story of a man with little left to lose, and nothing left to live for, who finds a bit of each in the most unlikely place.

With 10 main love interests, a slew of side romances, branching storylines, and plenty of sexiness, we hope you'll find many reasons to return again and again to Heaven's Door. So find a seat, get your singles ready, and prepare for the ride of a lifetime.
data.short_description: Heaven's Door is an adult visual novel with a focus on connection and romance with the various love interests you encounter. Its multiple endings will be influenced entirely by the decisions you make, the lives you change, and the women you choose to romance.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10, 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 950 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 950 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 950 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX9, or OpenGL ES 2 required

data.legal_notice: Heaven's Door, the Heaven's Door logo, AlterWorlds, and the AlterWorlds logo are trademarks of AlterWorlds, LC. Heaven's Door is copyright AlterWorlds, LC. All rights are reserved.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10, 11
  • Processor: Dual Core or better
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GT 950 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: 10.6 or higher
  • Processor: Dual Core or better
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GT 950 or better, AMD equivalent
  • Storage: 2 GB available space

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Processor: Dual Core or better
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GT 950 or better, AMD equivalent
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: OpenGL 2, DirectX9, or OpenGL ES 2 required
